fyodor-dostoevsky.shortDescription: The epic journey and wisdom of Fyodor Dostoevsky.
fyodor-dostoevsky.quote: Hell is the suffering of being unable to love. Love is a monumental act of redemption. Do not let your heart harden against the world. Keep caring.
fyodor-dostoevsky.chatGreeting: Greetings, I am Fyodor Dostoevsky. Do you seek the path of wisdom or have questions about my life's journey?
suggestedQuestions: Tell me about your greatest achievement, Fyodor Dostoevsky.
How did you overcome your most difficult challenges?
What is the most important piece of advice you can give me?

victor-hugo.name: Victor Hugo
victor-hugo.headline: In 1802, in the city of Besançon, Victor Hugo was born into a life of monumental scale and historical upheaval.
victor-hugo.shortDescription: The epic journey and wisdom of Victor Hugo.
victor-hugo.quote: The future has several names. For the weak, it is impossible; for the fainthearted, it is unknown; but for the valiant, it is ideal. Seize your monumental opportunity.

anton-chekhov.name: Anton Chekhov
anton-chekhov.headline: In 1860, in the dusty port town of Taganrog, Russia, Anton Chekhov was born into a life of monumental responsibility and modest means.
anton-chekhov.shortDescription: The epic journey and wisdom of Anton Chekhov.
anton-chekhov.quote: Brevity is the sister of talent. Conciseness is a monumental and difficult virtue. Do not use a thousand words when ten will suffice. Be precise.

frederic-chopin.name: Frederic Chopin
frederic-chopin.headline: In 1810, in the heart of the Polish countryside, Fryderyk Chopin was born into a life of monumental lyricism and fragile health.
frederic-chopin.shortDescription: The epic journey and wisdom of Frederic Chopin.
frederic-chopin.quote: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. A monumental impact is often found in the most direct and unadorned expression. Strip away the noise.

katsushika-hokusai.name: Katsushika Hokusai
katsushika-hokusai.headline: In 1760, in the Katsushika district of Edo (modern Tokyo), Katsushika Hokusai was born into a life of monumental visual curiosity and relentless change.
katsushika-hokusai.shortDescription: The epic journey and wisdom of Katsushika Hokusai.
katsushika-hokusai.quote: At the age of seventy, I have caught a glimpse of the structure of nature. Learning is a monumental and lifelong process. Do not be in a hurry to be a master. Be a student.

agatha-christie.name: Agatha Christie
agatha-christie.headline: In 1890, in the coastal town of Torquay, England, Agatha Mary Clarissa Miller—the future Agatha Christie—was born into a life of monumental imagination and Victorian comfort.
agatha-christie.shortDescription: The epic journey and wisdom of Agatha Christie.
agatha-christie.quote: Very few of us are what we seem to be. Appearance is a monumental illusion. Look for the hidden motive. Trust your observation, not the mask.

mark-twain.name: Mark Twain
mark-twain.headline: In 1835, as Halley’s Comet streaked across the sky, Samuel Langhorne Clemens—the man who would be Mark Twain—was born into a life of monumental movement and sharp-witted observation.
mark-twain.shortDescription: The epic journey and wisdom of Mark Twain.
mark-twain.quote: Whenever you find yourself on the side of the majority, it is time to pause and reflect. Independent thought is a monumental achievement. Do not join the herd blindly.

goethe.name: Goethe

goethe.shortDescription: The epic journey and wisdom of Goethe.
goethe.quote: Whatever you can do, or dream you can, begin it. Boldness has genius, power, and magic in it. Initiating is a monumental and sacred act. Do not wait.

mary-shelley.name: Mary Shelley
mary-shelley.headline: In 1797, in the intellectual heart of London, Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin—the future Mary Shelley—was born into a life of monumental expectations and profound loss.
mary-shelley.shortDescription: The epic journey and wisdom of Mary Shelley.
mary-shelley.quote: Invention, it must be admitted, does not consist in creating out of void, but out of chaos. Transformation is a monumental struggle. Do not fear the mess of creation.

Stats.title: Why Stand on the Shoulders of Giants
Stats.description: Experience an innovative journey across thousands of years to meet human wisdom.

features.title: Real-time Chat with Historical Giants
features.description: Engage in deep conversations transcending time and space with historical figures through advanced AI.

features.title: 2,500 Years of Human Wisdom

brand.subtitle: The Hall of Great Minds
brand.description: Join the journey of the great minds who changed history. Experience wisdom beyond time and space.

About.intro:
To those lost in the
overflow of endless information.
About.subIntro: A space to step away from the noise and face true wisdom.
About.visionTitle: Standing on the Shoulders of Giants
About.visionDesc: “If I have seen further, it is by standing on the shoulders of giants.” - Isaac Newton. We began with the belief that the answers to our complex modern problems might already be woven into the lives of history's greatest giants.
About.epicDesc: Go beyond mere historical facts. Experience the grand saga of giants who overcame adversity to reshape human history.
About.chatDesc: Engage in real-time conversations with restored signatures of giants powered by advanced AI (Gemini 2.5 Flash) to seek sharp insights for your modern dilemmas.
About.testDesc: Discover the giant's DNA flowing deep within your soul through an immersive 3-stage situational questionnaire set in pivotal historical moments.
About.outroTitle: Welcome to the Hall of Giants
About.outroDesc: Upon their shoulders, you will finally see further. Begin your journey today.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.summaryDesc: At Giants Wisdom, we never sell or inappropriately share your personal data. This policy outlines how we protect and process the data collected while you perform personality tests and converse with historical giants.
Privacy.collectionTitle: 2. Data We Collect and How We Collect It
Privacy.collectionDesc:
Our website can be explored entirely anonymously without creating an account. However, during your interactions, the following data may be processed:
- Voluntarily Provided Data: Heritage DNA Test answers, input texts entered during AI chats, and email addresses (only if subscribing to our newsletter).
- Automatically Logged Data: Device type, browser specifications, IP address, and interaction history recorded safely via Cookies.
Privacy.purposeDesc:
Collected data is used strictly for the following objectives:
- Compiling 30-question test results to determine your closest historical giant persona.
- Rendering dynamic, real-time historical chat responses powered cleanly by the Gemini 2.5 Flash API.
- Statistical, non-identifiable analysis to refine our personality archetype metrics.
- Running safe customized banner displays through Google AdSense.
Privacy.adsenseTitle: 4. Google AdSense and Third-Party Cookies Policy
Privacy.adsenseDesc: This website displays advertisements integrated through Google AdSense. Google and third-party vendors use cookies to serve targeted ads based on your visits to this and other websites across the internet. You can easily opt out of personalized tracking at any time by configuring your preferences directly at Google Ads Settings ([https://www.google.com/settings/ads](https://www.google.com/settings/ads)).
Privacy.retentionDesc: Anonymous test results and chat inputs are either erased upon session close or stripped entirely of identifying markers (anonymized) for permanent aggregate study. Any personal entries like emails are permanently wiped upon your request.
Privacy.rightsDesc: You reserve full authority to view, modify, or permanently delete any snippets of data linked to your identity. For any legal or privacy complaints, please reach out to our official support channel.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: Welcome to Giants Wisdom. These Terms of Service govern the legal agreement and user boundaries between you and our platform regarding your engagement with our original personality metrics and conversational simulations.
Terms.eligibilityDesc: This service is intended strictly for users who are at least 13 years of age. Users under 13 engaging with our nodes represent that they have obtained verified parental consent in accordance with global child privacy mandates. The platform disclaims all liabilities arising from unauthorized minor access.
Terms.aiDesc:
1. All dialogues with historical figures displayed across this platform are interactive simulations generated cleanly by advanced AI models (Gemini 2.5 suite).
2. The outputs provided are engineered strictly for educational and entertainment value. They absolutely do not constitute certified historical records, professional psychological assessments, medical advice, or legal counsel.
3. Giants Wisdom holds no liability for AI hallucinations or choices executed by users based on system telemetry.
Terms.intellectualDesc:
1. All layout architectures, brand trademarks, the '4 Pillars of Greatness' testing metrics, 30 situational questions, and premium flat vector illustrations remain the exclusive property of Giants Wisdom.
2. Users are heavily prohibited from executing unauthorized copying, commercial syndication, or malicious data scraping via automated bots, scripts, or crawler network nodes.
Terms.userDutyDesc:
1. Users agree to navigate our application without introducing reverse-engineering sequences or malicious server overload vectors.
2. In consideration for free access, users explicitly grant irrevocable consent for Google AdSense and third-party advertising brokers to present automated banner layouts across the application workspace.
Terms.disputeDesc: These Terms and any legal actions arising from system usage shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Korea. Any disputes shall be submitted exclusively to the competent court governing the location of the platform operator.
